# Basic example

Template:

```mustache
{{#features}}
- {{name}}: {{description}}
{{/features}}
{{^features}}
No features enabled.
{{/features}}
{{> footer}}
```

Context:

```json
{
  "features": [
    {
      "name": "scanner",
      "description": "splits templates into tokens"
    },
    {
      "name": "renderer",
      "description": "renders variables, sections and partials"
    }
  ]
}
```

Partials:

```json
{
  "footer": "Generated by Moon Mustache."
}
```

Expected output:

```text
- scanner: splits templates into tokens
- renderer: renders variables, sections and partials
Generated by Moon Mustache.
```
